coverage.criterion: Net worth view aggregates Firefly-linked accounts (giro, savings, etc.)
coverage.notes: Migration net_worth_snapshots + asset account schema (T-0049); wealth repository load_asset_accounts (T-0050); WealthService compute_breakdown + daily snapshots (T-0051); GET /api/v1/wealth + /wealth/history (T-0055); React /wealth page with breakdown table and stat card (T-0056); Dashboard 4 panels query net_worth_snapshots (T-0058); WealthService unit + integration tests (T-0059); operator guide net worth section (T-0060)

coverage.criterion: Scarcity alert fires when projected balance falls below configurable threshold (e.g. 200 €)
coverage.notes: alert_config scarcity_threshold_eur + alerts schema (T-0049); TOML [alerts] mirror to alert_config (T-0050); evaluate_scarcity household aggregate evaluator (T-0052); AlertService run_post_sync upsert/resolve (T-0053); sync alerts phase after forecast (T-0054); alert list/unread API (T-0055); Dashboard 1 $scarcity_threshold variable from alert_config (T-0058); scarcity boundary + severity unit tests + sync integration (T-0059); threshold config documented (T-0060)

coverage.criterion: Budget drift alert fires when category spending exceeds plan by configurable % (e.g. +20%)
coverage.notes: alert_config budget_drift_pct (T-0049); config + repository fetch_config (T-0050); evaluate_budget_drift category-targeted MTD proration (T-0052); AlertService orchestration (T-0053); sync pipeline triggers evaluation (T-0054); alert REST endpoints surface budget_drift rows (T-0055); proration + category-only unit tests (T-0059); operator guide budget drift triggers (T-0060)

coverage.criterion: Plan viability alert fires when active scenario becomes infeasible per forecast
coverage.notes: plan_viability alert_type enum + alerts table (T-0049); repository + EvalContext plan_computation_id binding (T-0050); evaluate_plan_viability negative month-end logic (T-0052); AlertService lifecycle + stale metadata (T-0053); sync passes active plan computation ID (T-0054); alert API exposes plan_viability alerts (T-0055); skip-without-plan + negative balance unit tests (T-0059); operator guide plan viability section (T-0060)

coverage.criterion: Alert inbox in React UI lists active alerts with acknowledge/dismiss
coverage.notes: alerts table with status lifecycle + fingerprint dedup (T-0049); acknowledge/dismiss/resolve repository methods (T-0050); AlertService list/unread_count/acknowledge/dismiss (T-0053); PATCH acknowledge/dismiss + GET alerts/unread-count (T-0055); header bell + /alerts inbox UI with Acknowledge/Dismiss actions (T-0057); lifecycle + unread count tests (T-0059); acknowledge vs dismiss semantics in user guide (T-0060)

coverage.criterion: Grafana Dashboard 4 shows total wealth (non-crypto until US-0007)
coverage.notes: net_worth_snapshots hypertable for trend data (T-0049); WealthService upsert_daily_snapshot feeds Grafana queries (T-0051); /wealth page Grafana link to uid portfolio (T-0056); portfolio.json Dashboard 4 total wealth stat + wealth-over-time + crypto placeholder (T-0058); operator guide Dashboard 4 access (T-0060)

summary.tasks_without_acceptance_ref_note: All tasks T-0049–T-0060 map to at least one AC in tasks.md acceptance refs and coverage map
